title: agrostis stolonifera var. narbonensis
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. narbonensis, also known as creeping bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Agrostis genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of creeping bent include soothing skin irritations and wounds, and reducing swelling and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, creeping bent is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
